summary: When calling EXEC_NPU_CMD for aclnnBatchNorm in the pybind layer, boolean and scalar attributes must be stored in local lvalue variables before passing them into the macro. Supplying literals like true, 0.1 or eps directly can break template conversion inside pytorch_npu_helper and cause CppExtension build failures.
